steps.name: Install PowerShell (Linux)
steps.run:
if ! command -v pwsh &> /dev/null; then
  sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y powershell
fi

steps.name: Install PowerShell (macOS)
steps.run:
if ! command -v pwsh &> /dev/null; then
  brew install powershell/tap/powershell
fi

steps.name: Install PowerShell
steps.run:
if ! command -v pwsh &> /dev/null; then
  sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y powershell
fi

steps.name: Validate version matches version.json
Build archives
steps.run:
VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
STAGING="${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}"

# rsync copies the working tree into staging, skipping .git/, build
# caches, and node_modules. studio-ui/static is gitignored but lives
# outside the exclude list so the just-built assets land in the
# archive.
mkdir "$STAGING"
rsync -a \
  --exclude='.git/' \
  --exclude='node_modules/' \
  --exclude='**/node_modules/' \
  --exclude='src/studio-ui/.vite/' \
  --exclude='.bot/' \
  --exclude="/${STAGING}/" \
  --exclude="${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-*.tar.gz" \
  --exclude="${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-*.zip" \
  --exclude="${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-*.sha256" \
  ./ "$STAGING/"

tar czf "${STAGING}.tar.gz" "$STAGING"
zip -r "${STAGING}.zip" "$STAGING" > /dev/null

steps.name: Compute SHA256
steps.run:
VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
echo "sha256_tar=$(sha256sum ${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.tar.gz | cut -d' ' -f1)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
echo "sha256_zip=$(sha256sum ${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.zip | cut -d' ' -f1)" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
sha256sum ${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.tar.gz > ${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.tar.gz.sha256
sha256sum ${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.zip > ${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.zip.sha256

steps.name: Create GitHub Release
steps.run:
VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}"
NOTES_FILE=$(mktemp)
cat >"$NOTES_FILE" <<'EOF'
## Install

```bash
# Clone the repo (or extract the archive) and run bootstrap once:
git clone --branch v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }} https://github.com/andresharpe/dotbot ~/dotbot
pwsh ~/dotbot/bootstrap.ps1

# Point DOTBOT_HOME at the checkout for every shell:
export DOTBOT_HOME="$HOME/dotbot"      # bash / zsh / sh
# or, on Windows: setx DOTBOT_HOME "$HOME\dotbot"
```

Migrating from an older copy-based install? See [MIGRATING.md](MIGRATING.md).

## Changes

EOF
gh release create "v${VERSION}" \
  --title "v${VERSION}" \
  --notes-file "$NOTES_FILE" \
  --generate-notes \
  "${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.tar.gz" \
  "${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.zip" \
  "${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.tar.gz.sha256" \
  "${ARCHIVE_PREFIX}-${VERSION}.zip.sha256"
